name: Zero-G Cable Autopsy
description: Use two independently constrained grippers and an orbiting view to remove a flexible zero-gravity cable from a peg-and-ring topology without contacting alarm spheres.
natural_language: Free the cable using both grippers. Do not touch the red contacts.

metadata.notes: Server independently replays every Verlet/PBD substep, swept gripper blocker, segment-solid collision, alarm contact, winding measure, and endpoint plane crossing.
